title: malaxis angustifovea
intro: Malaxis angustifovea, also known as the narrow-leaved malaxis, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Malaxis genus. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Malaxis angustifovea include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
